summary: Hydrated state shows the original Discord stale-socket crash canonical #57291 and most same-root reports are already closed as fixed on current main 82262387651ab270b565f71533ce4937c9c00dc6. No merge or close actions are safe or needed in this run. Open #38853 is related but not a duplicate: it tracks Discord REST Cloudflare/Error 1015 rate-limit handling and needs a narrow fix artifact. Open #64201 is an independent plugin config reload crash. Security-sensitive linked refs #22003 and #69833 are quarantined only for central security handling.
